name: Penta
description: The Penta Launcher fires up to five grenades that can be remotely triggered at just the right moment.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Penta Launcher fires up to five grenades that can be remotely triggered at just the right moment.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Control Module
components.description:
Autonomy processor for Robotics. A Corpus design.

Location: Europa, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Carmine Penta 
Penta
Secura Penta

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.changes:
Carmine Penta
A special variant of the Penta grenade launcher, featuring a higher fire rate and doubled magazine size.
Find the Carmine Penta Blueprint and Components on new Corpus Railjack Derelict Freightlinkers!

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Hotfix 27.4.4
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Radial explosions from weapons (Penta, etc) not doing damage to Crewship Reactors.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.16
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Penta/Secura Penta grenades becoming stuck when Napalm Grenades is equipped, thus rendering the Penta unusable. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1174244-penta-grenades-getting-stuck-causing-the-weapon-to-be-completely-useless/

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Hotfix 27.2.2
patchlogs.changes:
Penta: 50%
Secura Penta: 60%

patchlogs.name: Prime Vault: Hotfix 25.7.3 + 25.7.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where some projectiles wouldn't come to a complete stop and would slowly float away (noticed on some bouncing Penta grenades).

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.5.5
patchlogs.changes: Updated Secura Penta's napalm projectiles when using the Napalm Grenades Mod, so that they better reflect the Penta's stats (higher Status Effect and Critical Chances).

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.3.2 - Nightwave
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed wonky projectile launch position of the Penta.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed viewing the Penta in the marketplace (specifically the Penta Shock-Camo Skin) resulting in the ammo in the gun taking a second to load upon viewing it everytime.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Penta grenades will now bounce off the Blunt. It has a similar behavior as hitting a Grineer. Note that projectiles like Quanta cubes do not bounce off Grineer. Thus, cubes will not bounce off the Blunt.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Penta grenades not detonating in succession while switching weapons with Adhesive Blast equipped.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.additions: To improve performance, added a small delay between each explosion when activating the alt-fire on certain weapons (e.g. Simulor, Penta).
patchlogs.changes:
Each Instrument is in the same key (D minor Pentatonic), so if you’re feeling adventurous try mixing and matching Instruments to create unique compositions.
Javlok, Buzlok, Ferrox, Harpak, Hind, Mutalist Quanta, Penthera, Paracyst, Penta, Quanta (Vandal), Stradavar, Tenora, Zarr
Fixed the Tether Grenade Mod for the Penta cancelling Self Damage.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed unintentional DOT from Adhesive Blast on the Ogris, Penta, Secura Penta, and Tonkor.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 19.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Adhesive Blast causing the Zarr, Penta, Tonkor, Torid, Secura Penta, and Ogris’ projectile sound to not play.

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Penta and Quanta Ranger Eximus’ merging into one another when viewed in the Codex.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.changes: Penta series damage increased in Conclave

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Increased AoE damage of the Penta, Castanas series, Talons and Kulstar in Conclave.
Increased the ammo pool of Penta series in Conclave.
Penta explosions visual FX have been updated, and will now be based on the player’s energy color.
Fixed the Adhesive Blast Mod causing Penta weapons to detonate after a certain amount of time.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.10 & Tactial Alert: Divine Will
patchlogs.changes:
Removed the headshot multiplier from the Penta series, Castanas series, Kulstar, Talons and Angstrum in Conclave.
The Penta series, Castanas series, Kulstar, Talons and Angstrum’s explosive damage no longer ignores cover in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.1.3
patchlogs.changes: Increased damage and ammo pool of Penta series in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes: Increased blast radius of Penta series and Tonkor in PvP

patchlogs.name: Update 17.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Penta Grenades falling through the floor instead of bouncing.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Penta series damage increased in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage radius of the Penta series in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.3.1
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of the Penta series in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.3.0
patchlogs.changes: The Penta, Hek, and Cernos can now be used in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.4.5 + 16.4.5.1 + 16.4.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tonkor and Penta not being affected by Volt’s Electric Shield as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/446728-tonkor-does-not-seem-to-be-affected-by-electric-shield/

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.changes: PENTA RANGER (Corpus Jet Pack Spaceman with Penta): Crewman equipped with a jetpack.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.5: Operation Cryotic Front!
patchlogs.fixes: • Fixed issues with blank “Trigger” types in the UI for Penta, Castanas and Deconstructor.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive
patchlogs.fixes: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive Psa: The Launcher May Require You To Enter Your Windows Administrator Password To Update Your Firewall Rules.Avalanche Offensive Is On Until Monday @ 12 Noon Edt! Avalanche Offensivedefeat The Corpus Arctic Eximus!A Message From Cantis Of The Red Veil Resistance:Here'S What You'Ll Need To Dogo Forth And Take Down The Corpus Arctic Eximus, Tenno!Additions:Weapon Balance Changes:     • Grakata    • Castanas    • Ogris    • Torid    • Penta    • Lanka    • Vectis    • Vulkar    • Angstrum:    • Acrid:    • Attica:    • Spectra & Flux Rifle:    • Snipetron (+Vandal):    • Torid Changes:    • All Launchers:Key Hosting Improvements:Changes:Fixes:

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.1.3
patchlogs.fixes: Penta shots fired from Hall of Mirror clones will no longer display weapon trails.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.5
patchlogs.changes: Performance Improvements for Mirage + Hall of Mirrors and Angstrum, Ogris, Penta, and Mutalist Quanta, and Stug.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.7.0 + 13.7.0.1: Depths Of The Void
patchlogs.changes: Improved the performance of the Penta on low end computers.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.0.5
patchlogs.changes: Changes to Penta’s sounds.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Penta energy colour not always applying to grenades.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.3.3
patchlogs.changes: Changes to Penta aiming reticule – firing trajectory should better align with reticule.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.3.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Tweaks to Penta 2D sounds.
Lens flare added to Penta projectiles.
Penta now supports energy color customization.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Tenno Reinforcement: The Penta! A Corpus Grenade Launcher enters the Tenno Arsenal!
